# Avante Visibility
> AI visibility audits, review intelligence, and Google Business Profile audits for businesses and agencies nationwide.

## About
Avante Visibility helps businesses understand and improve how they appear in AI-powered search platforms like ChatGPT, Google AI Overviews, Perplexity, and Claude. Founded by JoLyn Laney, a 20+ year digital marketing veteran.

## Services
- AI Visibility Audit ($297+): Tests whether AI platforms recommend your business and identifies gaps
- Review Intelligence Audit ($197+): Analyzes review sentiment, language, and competitive positioning
- Google Business Profile Audit ($197+): Comprehensive GBP optimization assessment
- Full Digital Visibility Package ($597): All three audits bundled with unified strategy

## For Agencies
White-label audit program with wholesale pricing (50%+ margins), 3-5 day turnaround, no minimums.
